rationale: The citing paper uses Van Nierop et al. (2010) in its methodological positioning, not just as background. It explicitly groups that paper among approaches that infer consideration sets through stronger functional-form assumptions, and later cites it as a concrete threshold-crossing alternative for modeling choice-set membership. This citation helps motivate why the authors use micro awareness data and their own specification rather than relying on assumption-driven retrieval alone.
relation_description: The citing paper methodologically challenges the approach represented by Van Nierop et al. (2010), arguing that its own data-augmented framework can reduce reliance on strong functional-form assumptions in consideration-set inference. Van Nierop et al. is also referenced as an alternative modeling route the authors choose not to implement.
